description:
You have the 'inventory-manager' Maven project open in IntelliJ IDEA (located at ~/IdeaProjects/inventory-manager). The project contains 5 Java source files with messy, inconsistent formatting: mixed tabs and spaces, varying indentation sizes, wildcard imports (e.g., import java.util.*), unused imports, excessive blank lines, and trailing whitespace. The project has a .editorconfig file that specifies the desired formatting rules (4-space indentation, no tabs).

Reformat the code and optimize imports for the entire src/main/java directory to comply with the project's formatting standards. Ensure all Java files under src/main/java/com/inventory/ have consistent 4-space indentation, no wildcard imports, no unused imports, and no trailing whitespace. Verify the project builds successfully after these changes.
